name: AeroGrip Pro Running Shoes
description: Lightweight, high-performance running shoes designed for endurance. Features a high-traction sole for mixed terrains.
review_summary: Highly recommended for flat feet due to the stiff arch support.
Perfect for intense physical training and long-distance running; very durable.
Runs about a half-size small, recommend ordering up.

name: FocusMax Noise-Cancelling Headphones
description: Over-ear wireless headphones that block out ambient noise, perfect for deep work or noisy environments.
review_summary: Absolute lifesaver for blocking out background noise while studying for competitive exams.
Audio quality is amazing for music, but the microphone is just average for phone calls.
Very comfortable even after wearing them for 6 hours straight.

name: SummitX 2-Person Trekking Tent
description: A compact, lightweight tent designed for backpackers. Quick to set up and built to withstand harsh weather.
review_summary: Survived a heavy rainstorm on a 3-day hike without a single leak.
Very lightweight and easy to carry, but a bit cramped if both people are over 6 feet tall.
Setup takes less than 5 minutes once you get the hang of it.

name: ErgoSpine Posture Chair
description: An ergonomic office chair engineered to support the natural curve of your spine during long sitting sessions.
review_summary: Saved my lower back. I sit at my desk reading and coding for 8 hours a day and feel no pain.
Assembly was a bit frustrating and took about an hour.
The adjustable lumbar piece is the best feature for posture correction.

name: Lumina Smart Desk Lamp
description: A sleek, modern desk lamp that reduces eye strain and charges your phone simultaneously.
review_summary: The cool white light setting is perfect for late-night reading without straining my eyes.
The wireless charger is a bit slow, but it's a nice bonus feature.
Very flexible neck, easy to point the light exactly where you need it on your textbook.

name: HydraFlask Stainless Steel Bottle
description: Double-wall vacuum insulated bottle that keeps your drinks icy cold for 24 hours or piping hot for 12 hours.
review_summary: I left it in my hot car all day and the water still had ice in it. Amazing.
Very durable, dropped it twice on concrete and it only has a tiny scratch.
The straw lid is super convenient for drinking while working out or driving.
